---
applyTo: "**"
---

Always run a skills-discovery pass before solving the task:
- Inspect `.github/copilot_assets/skills/*/SKILL.md`.
- Select and use relevant skills when possible.
- Prefer the smallest set of skills that covers the request.
- If a skill is used, mention which skill(s) were applied.
- If no skill applies, state that briefly and continue.

Hard constraints:
- Do not skip skills discovery, even for short tasks.
- Do not edit `.github/copilot_assets/skills/**` unless explicitly requested by the user.
